tasks.task_goal: Remove peeling paint from a wooden windowsill before repainting
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose and flaking paint is lifted off, leaving a smooth, bare surface ready for primer
required_tool_attributes: sturdy ergonomic handle for controlled force
sufficient blade width to cover surface
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded rubber edge (not a rigid, flat beveled steel edge)
flimsy, slippery handle that prevents controlled force
very narrow, non-replaceable, dull edge

tasks.task_goal: Scrape baked-on food residue from a cast-iron skillet
tasks.expected_outcome: Carbonized bits are removed without gouging the seasoning, restoring a clean cooking surface
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled blade for low scraping angle
unconventional_tools: stainless steel putty knife (painter’s scraper) with rubber handle
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or thick rounded edge made of non-metal instead of a thin, rigid metal edge
perpendicular/blunt scraping face with no low-angle bevel
heat-sensitive construction that deforms when hot and a smooth, slippery or handle-less grip

tasks.task_goal: Lift adhesive label residue from a glass jar
tasks.expected_outcome: Sticky film is sheared off the glass, leaving a clear, residue-free surface
required_tool_attributes: low-angle holder to maintain shallow approach
stiff blade retention to prevent flex
unconventional_tools: old plastic gift card or loyalty card
stainless steel ruler with a beveled edge
opposite_tool_attributes: Dull, rounded, flexible edge that deforms instead of cutting/scraping
High-angle, bulky holder that forces a steep approach away from the surface
Loose, wobbly blade retention with a slippery, uncomfortable handle

tasks.task_goal: Remove old silicone caulk from a bathtub seam
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened caulk bead is stripped from the seam, exposing clean edges for new sealant
required_tool_attributes: hooked tip to get under beads
unconventional_tools: seam ripper (sewing tool with hooked tip)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded edge instead of a narrow, rigid, beveled scraping edge
flat, non-hooked tip that cannot get under caulk beads
slippery, handle-less grip that prevents a steady pulling force

tasks.task_goal: Clear ice from a car windshield on a winter morning
tasks.expected_outcome: Ice sheets are shaved off the glass, restoring full visibility
unconventional_tools: rigid plastic dustpan with a beveled lip
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded scraping surface that deforms under pressure
blunt, unbeveled or convex edge that cannot shear ice
cold-brittle material that cracks or shatters at freezing temperatures

tasks.task_goal: Lift dried candle wax from a hardwood table
tasks.expected_outcome: Wax flakes off cleanly without scratching the wood finish
required_tool_attributes: thin blade to get under wax
rigid enough to transmit shear force
unconventional_tools: expired credit card or gift card
plastic fly swatter (use the rim of the swatter head)
opposite_tool_attributes: abrasive, sharp metal or gritty edge that can mar/scratch hardwood
thick, rounded/blunt leading edge that cannot slip under the wax
extremely floppy or compressible blade with poor/no handle, unable to transmit shear or provide control

tasks.task_goal: Remove a flattened wad of chewing gum from a concrete sidewalk
tasks.expected_outcome: Gum is separated from the concrete surface and lifted away in large pieces
required_tool_attributes: long handle for leverage and safe posture
secure blade mount to prevent flex
unconventional_tools: metal snow shovel with steel cutting edge
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible blade material (rubber/foam) that bends under pressure
dull, rounded or serrated edge instead of a razor-sharp, flat edge
short or no handle, eliminating leverage and forcing unsafe posture

tasks.task_goal: Shave off dried paint drips on an interior door before finishing
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened sags and drips are leveled flush with the surrounding surface
opposite_tool_attributes: thick, soft, compressible body instead of a thin, slightly flexible steel blade
rounded, non-beveled, cushioned edge instead of a straight, beveled scraping edge
limp structure with no rigid spine or handle to transmit force or maintain angle

tasks.task_goal: Strip barnacles and algae from a fiberglass boat hull at the marina
tasks.expected_outcome: Fouling is removed, leaving a smooth hull ready for washing and inspection
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled blade for efficient shearing
unconventional_tools: heavy-duty stainless steel BBQ spatula (grill turner)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible rubber or foam edge instead of a wide, rigid stainless-steel edge
non-corrosion-resistant materials (e.g., plain carbon steel) that rust in saltwater
blunt, rounded, non-angled contact surface instead of a slightly angled blade for shearing

tasks.task_goal: Clean burnt carbon off grill grates after a cookout
tasks.expected_outcome: Char and grease crust are scraped off, exposing bare metal bars
required_tool_attributes: grooved profile to match grate rods
rigid body to maintain contact pressure
long handle for leverage and safety
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, heat-sensitive scraping edge (rubber/silicone/plastic) that deforms or melts near heat
smooth, ungrooved edge that cannot match or bite onto round grate rods
flexible, flimsy body with a short or absent handle that prevents firm pressure and safe distance

tasks.task_goal: Remove bark from a green branch to prepare a walking stick
tasks.expected_outcome: Bark and cambium layers are shaved away, revealing smooth wood beneath
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid blade with sharpened bevel
slight blade camber for continuous contact
stiff edge to transmit shear along grain
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, rounded edge with no sharpened bevel instead of a long, rigid blade
single or no handles preventing two-handed, opposed pulling control
deeply concave or discontinuous cutting surface that cannot maintain continuous contact

tasks.task_goal: Knock rust scale off an old steel pipe before painting
tasks.expected_outcome: Loose rust flakes and scale are scraped away, leaving a more solid surface for coating
required_tool_attributes: slightly angled tip for aggressive shear
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, pliable scraping surface (rubber/silicone) with a rounded edge instead of a hardened steel, chisel-like edge
flexible, whippy shaft that bends under load instead of a rigid shaft
blunt, straight or rounded tip with no shear angle instead of a slightly angled tip for aggressive shearing

tasks.task_goal: Strip packed mud from the treads of work boots at the entryway
tasks.expected_outcome: Mud and clay are scraped out of the soles, reducing tracked-in dirt
required_tool_attributes: textured, flat edges to catch debris
stable, anchored frame for foot-applied force
unconventional_tools: Upside-down steel garden rake head bolted to a board as a fixed scraper
Old stainless barbecue grill grate recessed and anchored at the entry
Old oven rack (stainless wire shelf) secured in a frame for scraping
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible or compressible scraping surfaces (foam/fabric) instead of fixed, rigid metal edges
smooth, rounded edges without flat, textured contact surfaces to catch debris
lightweight, unanchored, unstable construction that shifts under foot pressure and degrades in weather

tasks.task_goal: Remove burnt-on spills from a glass-ceramic cooktop
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened residue is cleanly shaved from the glass without scratches
required_tool_attributes: low-angle head to keep blade nearly flat
unconventional_tools: Single-edge razor blade clamped in a medium binder clip (makeshift scraper with angle guard)
Utility knife blade embedded slightly into a thick rubber eraser to create a flat, grippy scraper
Old plastic gift/credit card used at a very low angle as a gentle scraper
opposite_tool_attributes: dull, flexible, rounded edge instead of a sharp, rigid blade
high/steep scraping angle or convex head that lifts the edge off the glass
slick, handle-less grip with no blade guard or angle control

tasks.task_goal: Scrape hardened mortar squeeze-out along tile edges during cleanup
tasks.expected_outcome: Excess mortar is removed from joints and tile faces without chipping
required_tool_attributes: triangular or pointed edge for tight corners
unconventional_tools: carbide-tipped masonry drill bit (used as a handheld scraper)
tungsten-carbide wheel glass cutter (using the point/wheel edge to chip/scrape)
old flathead screwdriver (using a corner of the tip as a scraper)
opposite_tool_attributes: large, soft, flexible tip that deforms under pressure (non-carbide)
rounded, blunt edge that can’t reach tight corners
flimsy, bendable handle with a non-abrasive, quickly-wearing surface

tasks.task_goal: Remove an old vinyl window graphic from storefront glass
tasks.expected_outcome: Vinyl film and adhesive are sheared off, leaving clear storefront glass
required_tool_attributes: adjustable head angle for shallow approach
rigid blade clamp to prevent chatter
unconventional_tools: Stainless-steel bench/dough scraper strapped to a telescoping paint roller pole
1-inch woodworking chisel hose-clamped to a broom handle
Single-edge razor blade held in a large binder clip taped to a painter's pole
opposite_tool_attributes: dull, rounded, flexible edge instead of a razor-sharp, flat blade
fixed, steep head angle with no adjustability for a shallow approach
loose, flexible blade clamp that allows chatter

tasks.task_goal: Strip old gasket material from an engine block mating surface
tasks.expected_outcome: All traces of the old gasket are removed, yielding a clean, flat sealing surface
required_tool_attributes: narrow, stiff steel blade with square edge
rigid shank to prevent flex near the edge
opposite_tool_attributes: wide, flexible rubber/plastic blade with a rounded edge
no bevel or a heavily rounded scraping face instead of a slight bevel
solvent-absorbent handle and a flexible/hinged shank that bends near the edge

tasks.task_goal: Scrape frost buildup off the inner walls of a chest freezer
tasks.expected_outcome: Frost sheets detach from the liner without gouging the plastic interior
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, brittle scraping edge that chips or snaps
curved/rounded, non-beveled surface instead of a flat blade
cold-sensitive, flexible material with no rigid handhold/grip

tasks.task_goal: Remove dried construction adhesive blobs from a concrete floor
tasks.expected_outcome: Hardened adhesive is sliced off flush with the slab, preparing it for new flooring
required_tool_attributes: thick, rigid steel blade with sharp edge
unconventional_tools: manual sidewalk ice chopper (long-handled steel ice scraper)
rigid metal putty knife hose-clamped to a broom handle
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible blade made of rubber or plastic with a blunt/rounded edge
short or no handle that provides little leverage
non-replaceable blade that dulls quickly

tasks.task_goal: Lift dried tree sap from a car’s painted door without scratching
tasks.expected_outcome: Sap is gently separated from the clear coat, preserving the finish
required_tool_attributes: soft, rigid plastic blade to avoid marring
unconventional_tools: expired plastic gift card or hotel key card
opposite_tool_attributes: hard, abrasive metal or serrated blade instead of soft, rigid plastic
thick, rounded, non-beveled edge instead of a finely beveled scraping edge
steep, high-angle holder that forces perpendicular contact instead of shallow contact
